name: Sirolimus in Older Adults
summary: Randomized phase 2 ClinicalTrials.gov study of sirolimus versus standard of care in adults 65 to 80 years old, measuring phenotypic and functional biomarkers of aging at 1 year. The registry had no posted results as of the February 3, 2026 last-update posting.
population: Adults 65 to 80 years old; all sexes; healthy volunteers accepted.

trial_details.expected_results_window: No completion date is recorded in this public record yet; May 2026 had no clear result expectation.
trial_details.horizon_note: Recruiting with no posted results, so this belongs on watch lists rather than in the evidence base.
trial_details.why_it_matters: A small older-adult sirolimus trial could make rapalog evidence more concrete if it reports function, safety, or aging-biomarker outcomes.
